hooks.command: cmd=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^\s*(npm|yarn)\s'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Use pnpm instead of npm/yarn."}'; exit 0; fi

cmd=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE 'git push.*(--force\b|-f\b)'; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Force pushing is not allowed. This is a public repository — rewriting shared history breaks contributors who have already pulled."}'; exit 0; fi

hooks.statusMessage: Running tests, lint and psalm before commit...
hooks.command: cmd=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('command',''))"); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'git commit'; then if ! pnpm test 2>&1; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Tests failed — fix failing tests before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; if ! pnpm run lint 2>&1; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"pnpm lint failed — fix errors before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; if [ -x vendor/bin/psalm ] && ! vendor/bin/psalm 2>&1; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"psalm static analysis failed — fix errors before committing"}'; exit 0; fi; fi
